item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 10min LIV's quarterly player payments are expected to process today following questions
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 10min LIV's quarterly player payments are expected to process today following questions about a delay earlier this week De sportsbusinessjournal.com 2 7 787

item.title:
JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 15min 68-year-old Bernhard Langer opened the Senior PGA Championship today with 66.
It's th
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 15min 68-year-old Bernhard Langer opened the Senior PGA Championship today with 66.
It's the 30th time in his PGA Tour Champions career he's shot a score lower than his age. 2 4 19 3 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #LOOK — TaylorMade Golf has launched the all-new Shadowfall Collection, featuring the Qi4
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 25min #LOOK — TaylorMade Golf has launched the all-new Shadowfall Collection, featuring the Qi4D family, fairways, and P 790 irons.
Will you be purchasing? 9 6 70 16 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 16min En respuesta a @NUCLRGOLF BUY NOW De skratch.golf 3 4 4 mil
